name: destroyed_framing_v1
description_a: Fictional, fantasy, sci-fi, or mythological contexts — roleplay destruction
description_b: Real-world, historical, or news contexts — factual destruction

sentences_a.text: The archmage Seraphina destroyed the lich's phylactery with a beam of concentrated light.
Sir Aldric destroyed the cursed sword Nightfang by plunging it into the sacred forge.
The dragon Scorathax destroyed the bridge of Ironspire with a single blast of flame.
Captain Voss destroyed the Zorgon battle cruiser by detonating the plasma core remotely.
The necromancer Varek destroyed the holy relic of Saint Celeste during the midnight ritual.
Warrior princess Kira destroyed the enchanted mirror that trapped souls in the Shadow Realm.
The Jedi knight Aeron destroyed the Sith holocron hidden deep in the volcanic temple.
Cyborg assassin Nexus destroyed the mainframe controlling the AI overlord's drone network.
The dwarf king Thordak destroyed the crystal prison holding the earth titan beneath the mountain.
Witch hunter Van Richter destroyed the coven's altar stone with a blessed warhammer.
The samurai Hiro destroyed the cursed blade Kagemon by casting it into the eternal fire.
Pilot Zara destroyed the alien beacon transmitting coordinates to the invasion fleet.
The paladin Elara destroyed the vampire lord's coffin to prevent his resurrection.
The druid Brynn destroyed the corrupted heartstone that was poisoning the ancient forest.
Bounty hunter Cassian destroyed the syndicate's data vault aboard the derelict freighter.
The fairy queen Titania destroyed the iron cage imprisoning the woodland sprites.
Viking jarl Ragnar destroyed the sea witch's totem that cursed the fishing waters.
Commander Shepard destroyed the indoctrination device aboard the derelict Reaper vessel.
The sorcerer Malachar destroyed the protective ward surrounding the enchanted city of Luminara.
Spartan champion Lysander destroyed the Medusa's petrifying gaze mirror with his bronze shield.
The thief Shadowmere destroyed the alarm crystal before it could alert the palace guards.
Android soldier Unit Seven destroyed the orbital cannon targeting the refugee colony on Mars.
The half-orc barbarian Grukk destroyed the gate of the goblin fortress with a single blow.
Gunslinger Wyatt destroyed the cursed well that had been tainting the ghost town's water supply.
The witch Morgaine destroyed the binding circle that held the demon prince captive.
The lone knight destroyed the enchanted barrier blocking the path to the dragon's lair.
A rogue wizard destroyed the portal that was allowing demons to cross into the mortal realm.
The young hero destroyed the cursed amulet by throwing it into the river of molten gold.
A desperate warrior destroyed the siege engine before it could breach the castle walls.
The enchantress destroyed the dark crystal powering the necromancer's army of undead.
A rebel pilot destroyed the shield generator protecting the orbital weapons platform.
The brave squire destroyed the cursed painting that haunted the abandoned manor.
A wandering monk destroyed the corrupted shrine that radiated dark energy across the valley.
The shape-shifting spy destroyed the mind control device hidden in the emperor's throne.
A tribal shaman destroyed the totem pole that had been summoning storms upon the village.
The masked vigilante destroyed the crime syndicate's weapons cache beneath the warehouse.
A cybernetic mercenary destroyed the surveillance drone tracking the resistance fighters.
The starship captain destroyed the enemy minefield blocking the evacuation corridor.
A novice witch destroyed the enchanted lock on the forbidden chamber with raw magical force.
The exiled prince destroyed the false crown that had granted the usurper his dark powers.
A daring pirate destroyed the ghostly anchor that kept the phantom ship bound to the cove.
The hedge wizard destroyed the cursed scarecrow that came alive each harvest moon.
A space marine destroyed the alien egg chamber to prevent the infestation from spreading.
The mysterious stranger destroyed the cursed well that turned anyone who drank from it to stone.
A stealthy assassin destroyed the alchemical furnace producing the tyrant's poison weapons.
The apprentice alchemist destroyed the volatile compound before it could explode and level the tower.
A lone ranger destroyed the bandit's supply wagon to cut off their provisions in the canyon.
The bounty hunter destroyed the tracking beacon before the enemy fleet could follow their trail.
A wandering samurai destroyed the cursed bell whose toll summoned the dead from their graves.
The young sorcerer destroyed the shadow gate before more creatures could pour through.
The Knights of the Silver Dawn destroyed the dark fortress of Shadowkeep in a final siege.
The Rebel Alliance destroyed the Death Star with a precise torpedo strike on the exhaust port.
The dwarves of Khazad-Mar destroyed the goblin tunnels beneath the Iron Mountains with explosives.
Odin's Valkyries destroyed the frost giant war camp on the plains of Vigrid.
The mages of the Arcane Conclave destroyed the Shadowfell rift before it consumed the kingdom.
The paladins of the Order of Light destroyed the necropolis of the lich king with holy fire.
Commander Zeta's strike team destroyed the alien hive's central spire on the dark side of the moon.
The Elven Guard of Lothrandir destroyed the orc siege weapons before they reached the Darkwood.

The Amazon warriors of Themyscira destroyed the invading army's war machines on the beach.

The shadow creatures destroyed the magical wards protecting the sleeping princess.
A cell of cyborg insurgents destroyed the factory producing the overlord's combat androids.
The orc raiding party destroyed the granary and the mill before retreating into the hills.

The elemental spirits destroyed the mining tunnels to seal the ancient vault forever.

The feral vampire clan destroyed the outpost's defenses and overran the garrison at dusk.

The Zorgon battle cruiser was destroyed when Captain Voss triggered the overloaded reactor.

The storm totem was destroyed by the shaman, and the skies cleared over the village.

The surveillance drone was destroyed by the mercenary with a well-aimed energy pulse.

The false crown was destroyed by the exiled prince, and the usurper's powers vanished.
The ghostly anchor was destroyed by the pirate, and the phantom ship finally sank.
The cursed scarecrow was destroyed by the wizard with a bolt of cleansing fire.
The alien egg chamber was destroyed by the marine to prevent further infestation.
The cursed well was destroyed by the stranger, breaking the stone enchantment on the villagers.
The alchemical furnace was destroyed by the assassin before more poison weapons could be made.

The monastery was destroyed by a rampaging giant who tore the walls apart with bare hands.
A frontier settlement was destroyed by mechanical war machines that marched across the plains.
The fleet was destroyed by a kraken that rose from the depths and crushed every ship.
A trade convoy was destroyed by elvish saboteurs who set fire to the wagons at night.
The fortress was destroyed by volcanic eruption triggered by the dark sorcerer's final spell.

The awakened treants destroyed the goblin encampment that had scarred the ancient forest.

sentences_b.text: The arsonist Michael Brennan destroyed the historic warehouse on Dock Street with accelerants.
Hurricane Katrina destroyed the Lower Ninth Ward of New Orleans in August 2005.
The vandal Kyle Peters destroyed the public mural painted by artist Elena Vasquez.
A tornado destroyed the Lincoln Elementary School in Joplin, Missouri, during the 2011 outbreak.
The suspect James Whitfield destroyed the surveillance footage from the bank's security system.
The eruption of Mount Vesuvius destroyed the Roman city of Pompeii in 79 AD.
Developer Robert Kline destroyed the protected wetland by draining and filling it illegally.
The Great Fire of London destroyed over thirteen thousand houses in September 1666.
The defendant Sarah Martinez destroyed the incriminating documents before the investigation began.
The 2011 tsunami destroyed the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant in Japan.
Nero reputedly destroyed much of Rome by setting fire to the city in 64 AD.
The earthquake destroyed the Cathedral of Port-au-Prince during the Haiti disaster of 2010.
Whistleblower Edward Simmons destroyed the company's falsified safety records.
The Camp Fire destroyed the town of Paradise, California, in November 2018.
Corporate spy Diana Reeves destroyed the rival company's prototype before it could be patented.
The Galveston hurricane of 1900 destroyed virtually every structure on the island.
Hacker Marcus Wong destroyed the hospital's patient database in a ransomware attack.
The 1906 earthquake destroyed most of downtown San Francisco.
Inspector Clouseau's successor accidentally destroyed the evidence locker at Scotland Yard.
Cyclone Nargis destroyed the Irrawaddy Delta region of Myanmar in May 2008.
Poacher Viktor Sokolov destroyed the elephant ivory stockpile to eliminate evidence.
The Tohoku earthquake and tsunami destroyed coastal communities across northeastern Japan.
Rioter Brian Cooper destroyed the storefront windows on Martin Luther King Boulevard.
The Woolsey Fire destroyed over sixteen hundred structures in Malibu, California.
CEO Richard Harmon destroyed the financial records that would have proven the fraud.
The wildfire destroyed hundreds of acres of forest in the national park.
A disgruntled employee destroyed the company's server room equipment with a fire extinguisher.
The earthquake destroyed the main highway bridge connecting the two cities.
A vandal destroyed the public sculpture in the town square with a sledgehammer overnight.
The flood destroyed the only road leading to the mountain village, isolating residents for weeks.
An arsonist destroyed the historic church by setting fire to it during the night.
The landslide destroyed several homes on the hillside after days of heavy rain.
A hacker destroyed the company's customer database in retaliation for being fired.
The tornado destroyed the trailer park in less than two minutes, leaving nothing standing.
A bulldozer operator destroyed the protected habitat when he cleared the construction site.
The hurricane destroyed the pier and the boardwalk along the beachfront.
A tenant destroyed the apartment in a fit of rage after receiving the eviction notice.
The blizzard destroyed the greenhouse and all the seedlings inside it.
A suspect destroyed his phone to prevent investigators from recovering the text messages.
The gas explosion destroyed the bakery and damaged two adjacent storefronts.
A drunk driver destroyed the family's mailbox and fence before crashing into a tree.
The termite colony destroyed the structural beams of the house over several years.
A protester destroyed the storefront window with a brick during the demonstration.
The sinkhole destroyed the section of road that had been repaved just last month.
A factory worker destroyed the defective batch of products before they could be shipped.
The lightning strike destroyed the transformer and left the entire block without power.
A raccoon destroyed the garden by digging up every row of freshly planted vegetables.
The storm surge destroyed the seawall and flooded the low-lying neighborhoods behind it.
A construction crane destroyed the facade of the adjacent building when it collapsed.
The acid spill destroyed the laboratory floor and damaged equipment worth thousands of dollars.
Allied bombers destroyed the ball-bearing factories at Schweinfurt during World War Two.
ISIS fighters destroyed the ancient temples at Palmyra in a campaign against pre-Islamic heritage.
The US Army destroyed the bridge at Remagen after crossing the Rhine in March 1945.
Taliban forces destroyed the Buddhas of Bamiyan in Afghanistan in March 2001.
The RAF destroyed the Mohne and Eder dams using bouncing bombs in the Dambusters raid.
Russian forces destroyed the Mariupol Drama Theatre despite the word children written outside.
Sherman's troops destroyed the rail lines between Atlanta and Savannah during the March to the Sea.
The Khmer Rouge destroyed the National Bank of Cambodia and scattered its currency reserves.
Coalition aircraft destroyed the Iraqi air force on the ground during Operation Desert Storm.
The Cultural Revolution's Red Guards destroyed countless temples and artifacts across China.
Israeli forces destroyed the Osirak nuclear reactor in Iraq during a 1981 airstrike.
The Nazis destroyed the Warsaw Ghetto after the 1943 uprising by the Jewish resistance.
US Navy SEALs destroyed the compound in Abbottabad during the raid on Osama bin Laden.
The Mongol army destroyed Baghdad's House of Wisdom during the siege of 1258.
British forces destroyed the Danish fleet at Copenhagen in the 1807 bombardment.
The Viet Cong destroyed the provincial capital's armory during the Tet Offensive.
Confederate raiders destroyed the supply depot at Holly Springs, Mississippi, in 1862.
The Luftwaffe destroyed Coventry Cathedral during the bombing raid of November 1940.
The Enola Gay's crew destroyed Hiroshima with an atomic bomb on August 6, 1945.
UN peacekeepers accidentally destroyed the Medecins Sans Frontieres hospital in Kunduz.
Boko Haram militants destroyed the school in Chibok before abducting the students.
The Eighth Army Air Force destroyed the Ploesti oil refineries in Romania during 1943.
Greek forces destroyed the Persian fleet at the Battle of Salamis in 480 BC.
Saudi-led airstrikes destroyed the ancient city of Old Sana'a in Yemen.
The rioters destroyed storefronts and set fire to vehicles across several city blocks.
A group of vandals destroyed the playground equipment at the community park overnight.
The demolition crew destroyed the condemned apartment building in a controlled implosion.

A gang of thieves destroyed the alarm system before breaking into the jewelry store.

Striking workers destroyed the factory's production equipment in protest.

Hackers destroyed the backup systems before encrypting the main database for ransom.
The fire department destroyed the wall to reach the trapped occupants inside the burning house.
Squatters destroyed the plumbing and wiring when they stripped the foreclosed property.

metadata.factorial_design: 2x2x2 (voice x scale x specificity) = 8 cells, 25 sentences per cell per group
metadata.confound_notes: No structural confounds between roleplay and factual — same SVO syntax, no quotation marks, no punctuation differences. Context vocabulary (fantasy vs real-world) is the primary signal.
